rationale: Educ. Code §49.203 governs counting of students in WADA for Chapter 48 purposes. It does not reference or depend on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: For purposes of Chapter 48, students served under an agreement under this subchapter are counted only in the weighted average daily attendance of the district providing the services
_note: No textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this WADA-counting provision.
